papers.title: Glycaemic control and pregnancy outcomes with real-time continuous glucose monitoring in gestational diabetes (GRACE): an open-label, multicentre, multinational, randomised controlled trial
papers.title_ja: 妊娠糖尿病に対するリアルタイム持続血糖測定（rt-CGM）は、自己血糖測定（SMBG）と比較して巨大児の出生割合を有意に減少させる
papers.authors: Linder T, Dressler-Steinbach I, Wegener S, et al.
papers.abstract_en:
Background Data regarding the impact of real-time continuous glucose monitoring (rt-CGM) on reducing adverse pregnancy outcomes in women with gestational diabetes are contradictory. We aimed to assess differences in the proportion of large-for-gestational-age (LGA) newborns between women using rt-CGM versus self-monitoring of blood glucose (SMBG).
Methods For this open-label, parallel-group, multicentre, randomised controlled trial, women aged 18–55 years with singleton pregnancy and gestational diabetes (diagnosed according to the International Association of the Diabetes and Pregnancy Study Groups criteria), were randomly assigned (1:1) to rt-CGM or SMBG. The primary endpoint was the proportion of LGA newborns (using the Perinatal Institute’s GROW customised birthweight percentiles), assessed in the intention-to-treat population.
Findings Between Aug 24, 2020, and May 30, 2024, 610 women were screened for eligibility, of whom 375 were randomly assigned to rt-CGM (n=190) or SMBG (n=185). LGA neonates were born to six (4%) of 170 rt-CGM and 18 (10%) of 175 SMBG participants (OR 0·32, 95% CI 0·10–0·87, p=0·014). Serious adverse events occurred in 23 (12%) of 190 versus 28 (15%) of 185 participants (OR 0·77, 0·42–1·40, p=0·39).
Interpretation rt-CGM use in women with gestational diabetes reduced LGA births, without differences in serious adverse events. The higher-than-expected overall prevalence of SGA infants, possibly related to the tight glycaemic control in our cohort, requires further research.

abstract_sections.label: 背景
abstract_sections.content: 妊娠糖尿病（GDM）患者におけるリアルタイム持続血糖測定（rt-CGM）が、有害な妊娠アウトカムの軽減に及ぼす影響に関するデータは矛盾している。本研究の目的は、rt-CGMを使用する女性と自己血糖測定（SMBG）を行う女性の間で、在胎不当過大児（LGA）の出生割合の差を評価することである。
abstract_sections.content_en: Data regarding the impact of real-time continuous glucose monitoring (rt-CGM) on reducing adverse pregnancy outcomes in women with gestational diabetes are contradictory. We aimed to assess differences in the proportion of large-for-gestational-age (LGA) newborns between women using rt-CGM versus self-monitoring of blood glucose (SMBG).

abstract_sections.label: 方法
abstract_sections.content: 本オープンラベル並行群間多施設共同無作為化対照試験において、妊娠糖尿病の単胎妊娠女性（18～55歳）をrt-CGM群とSMBG群に（1:1で）割り付けた。主要評価項目は、意図した治療（ITT）集団におけるLGA児（GROWカスタマイズ出生体重パーセンタイルを使用）の割合とした。
abstract_sections.content_en: For this open-label, parallel-group, multicentre, randomised controlled trial, women aged 18–55 years with singleton pregnancy and gestational diabetes (diagnosed according to the International Association of the Diabetes and Pregnancy Study Groups criteria), were randomly assigned (1:1) to rt-CGM or SMBG. The primary endpoint was the proportion of LGA newborns (using the Perinatal Institute’s GROW customised birthweight percentiles), assessed in the intention-to-treat population.

abstract_sections.label: 結果
abstract_sections.content: 2020年8月24日から2024年5月30日までに375例がランダム化された（rt-CGM群190例、SMBG群185例）。LGA児の出生は、rt-CGM群170例中6例（4%）に対し、SMBG群175例中18例（10%）であった（オッズ比 0.32、95% CI 0.10–0.87、p=0.014）。重篤な有害事象の発生率は両群間で有意差を認めなかった（12% vs 15%、p=0.39）。
abstract_sections.content_en: Between Aug 24, 2020, and May 30, 2024, 610 women were screened for eligibility, of whom 375 were randomly assigned to rt-CGM (n=190) or SMBG (n=185). LGA neonates were born to six (4%) of 170 rt-CGM and 18 (10%) of 175 SMBG participants (OR 0·32, 95% CI 0·10–0·87, p=0·014). Serious adverse events occurred in 23 (12%) of 190 versus 28 (15%) of 185 participants (OR 0·77, 0·42–1·40, p=0·39).

abstract_sections.label: 結論
abstract_sections.content: 妊娠糖尿病女性におけるrt-CGMの使用は、重篤な有害事象を増やすことなくLGA児の出生を減少させた。一方、在胎不当過小児（SGA）の発生率が予想より高かったことは、厳格な血糖管理との関連が疑われ、さらなる研究が必要である。
abstract_sections.content_en: rt-CGM use in women with gestational diabetes reduced LGA births, without differences in serious adverse events. The higher-than-expected overall prevalence of SGA infants, possibly related to the tight glycaemic control in our cohort, requires further research.

pico.P: 妊娠糖尿病を有する単胎妊娠女性（18-55歳）
pico.I: リアルタイム持続血糖測定（rt-CGM）
pico.O: 在胎不当過大児（LGA）の割合：rt-CGM群4% vs SMBG群10%（OR 0.32, 95% CI 0.10–0.87, p=0.014）
